nasb.text: but to Hannah he would give a double portion, for he loved Hannah, but the Lord had closed her womb.

esv.text: But to Hannah he gave a double portion, because he loved her, though the Lord had closed her womb.

cnv.text: 但他只分給哈拿一分；他雖然愛哈拿，耶和華卻使哈拿不能懷孕。

ccb.text: 但他会给哈娜双份祭肉，因为他爱哈娜，虽然耶和华使她不能生育。
